title: Potion of Water Breathing
summary: You can breathe underwater for 1 hour after drinking this potion. Its cloudy green fluid smells of the sea and has a jellyfish---like bubble floating in it.

contentBlocks.text: Potion of Water Breathing Potion, uncommon
You can breathe underwater for 1 hour after drinking this potion. Its cloudy green fluid smells of the sea and has a jellyfish---like bubble floating in it.
